title: /fil
text: /fil Specify input file name to create and compile the keyboard translation table. /fil FileName Used With /tra Description The /fil sub-switch uses the definitions in FileName to create and compile the keyboard translation table TERMFILE for the current language and library. The definitions in FileName must have been created with the /key command line switch. Related Links /key Build keyboard translation tables in a character-based interface. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
